hero.title: CANDELARIA
hero.subtitle: Solar Vehicle Project
hero.description: A student-led solar vehicle project focused on a
hero.joinText: Be part of the future of sustainable transportation

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We are dedicated to advancing sustainable transportation through innovative solar vehicle technology, fostering engineering excellence, and inspiring the next generation of clean energy pioneers.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.text: Pushing the boundaries of solar vehicle technology through creative engineering solutions and cutting-edge research.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.text: Committed to developing environmentally friendly transportation alternatives that reduce carbon emissions and promote clean energy.

education.title: Education
education.text: Providing hands-on learning experiences that prepare students for careers in sustainable engineering and renewable energy technologies.

teams.title: Our Teams
teams.description: Candelaria is divided in 7 different teams. Each one of them plays a crucial role in the project.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.socialDescription: If you are interested in the project or want to know more about it, feel free to contact us. Also, you can check our social media accounts where we post the most important information about the project.
contact.description: Have questions about our solar vehicle project? Want to join our team or support our mission? We'd love to hear from you!
contact.successMessage: Thank you for your message! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorMessage: Sorry, there was an error sending your message. Please try again.

supportUs.description: At the moment, Candelaria project has only being sponsored by the Universidad de los Andes and the effort of its members. But if you are interested in sponsor or support the project to participate in upcoming solar vehicle competitions, clicking the following button, you will be redirected to a payment gateway where you can voluntarily give a monetary support to the project:

about.collaborationText: to design and build a high-performance solar vehicle.
about.researchText: in solar mobility, shared through publications and education.
about.excellenceText: validated through testing and international competitions.
